source_pr.title: statistics: improve statslock test
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/44940

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The PR improves stats lock tests and adjusts Bazel race-detector settings; no concrete flaky failure signature is captured in the case.
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (statslock test improvement + Bazel race settings).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: While stats lock tests can be timing/concurrency sensitive, this case does not capture an actual flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change; the only explicit signal is a Bazel race-detector setting change. Classify as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a confirmed data-race root cause.
fix_pattern: Adjust statslock tests and Bazel execution settings; no clearly evidenced targeted flaky stabilization change in the case.
analysis:
PR title: statistics: improve statslock test
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45616
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (5): statistics/handle/handletest/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/statslock/BUILD.bazel, statistics/handle/handletest/statslock/main_test.go, statistics/handle/handletest/statslock/stats_lcok_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
